calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-21-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as regularly scheduled for Settlement Conference. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Saul Martin Ferster, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Japanese American Religious Federation Housing, Inc. and Gregory Chandler, Esq. represented Defendants, Karen Vandermeulen Brown and Anthony Brown. Also present, Bill Johnson, Property Manager for the Plaintiff. The matter settled per oral stipulation of parties and read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
